run.label: hermite_simpson_continuation_baseline
run.evidence_level: continuous-backend Hermite-Simpson direct-collocation continuation baseline/probe with persisted nominal-control warm starts and trajectory stacking; non-teacher catalog halo phase-shift targets; not a quantum/discrete result

phase_continuation_single.purpose: one-segment outage selected-branch continuation at N=8; warm rows reuse the cold p=0.3 persisted nominal controls (trajectory stacking)

hard_catalog_probe.purpose: hard-catalog stress probe at tighter amax warm-started from the cold p=0.3 row; failed/negative diagnostics are preserved honestly and not extrapolated

resume_rejected_rows.reason: warm-start source controls are unavailable or stale
warm-start source controls are unavailable or stale
warm-start source controls are unavailable or stale

threshold_rule: meets_thresholds requires nominal_error <= nominal_success and selected_worst_error <= robust_success

semantics.backend: This is a continuous-backend Hermite-Simpson direct-collocation implementation baseline/probe with persisted nominal-control warm starts and trajectory stacking; it is NOT a quantum, QUBO, QAOA, or discrete schedule-search result.
semantics.continuation: Continuation rows pass the previous row's persisted nominal controls to qlt.direct_collocation.run_direct_collocation_baseline as nominal_control_guess. Controls are Euclidean projected to the amax ball before use.
semantics.hermite_simpson: Hermite-Simpson constant-control direct transcription; controls are held constant over each segment and no independent midpoint control variables are optimized.
semantics.all_mask: all_mask_worst_error and all_outage_errors evaluate all configured outage masks. Selected masks use optimized branch recovery controls; unselected masks use masked nominal controls only.
semantics.target: Non-teacher catalog halo phase-shift target generated by zero-thrust CR3BP phase propagation of the JPL halo source state.

limitations: Normalized Earth-Moon CR3BP only; not a flight-ready trajectory optimization.
Constant-control Hermite-Simpson scheme; no independent midpoint control variables.
Warm starts use only persisted nominal controls from the named source row.
Failed/negative diagnostics are preserved honestly and not extrapolated.
The optimizer may stop at max_nfev; such rows are retained with optimizer_success=False.
target_generation: non-teacher catalog_halo_phase_shift target from the JPL initial_nrho_like_l2_southern_halo source state propagated ballistically in normalized CR3BP for the configured phase_time

rows.group_purpose: one-segment outage selected-branch continuation at N=8; warm rows reuse the cold p=0.3 persisted nominal controls (trajectory stacking)
rows.target_generation: non-teacher catalog_halo_phase_shift target from the JPL initial_nrho_like_l2_southern_halo source state propagated ballistically in normalized CR3BP for the configured phase_time
rows.selected_branch_semantics: nominal trajectory and selected outage branches are optimized in one least-squares direct transcription; branch starts are fixed by RK4 propagation through the missed segment(s), then branch controls are re-optimized after the outage
rows.all_mask_diagnostic_semantics: all outage masks are evaluated after optimization; selected masks use optimized branch recovery controls and unselected masks use masked nominal controls only
rows.control_bound_semantics: all nominal and branch controls are Euclidean projected to ||u_i|| <= amax inside residual evaluation, RK4 reporting propagation, fuel computation, and output diagnostics; scalar optimizer bounds are finite guards, not the scientific bound
rows.message: The maximum number of function evaluations is exceeded.
